name: Milkless Cereal
note: Four friends, a lot of ideas, and a lot of fun. I owe all of my current skills (as of 05/22/26) to the time spent working with these amazing people.

name: Chainsaw Man
note: My all time favourite series. The characters, the grit. All of it is amazing. The Reze Arc film was an absolute 10/10. I'd honestly give all of part one a 10 as well. Listen to 'in the pool' or 'in the sea' and tell me you don't get chills.

name: The Legend of Zelda Series
note: When I was around 6 years old my father introduced me to the Zelda Series with The Wind Waker. I spent countless hours playing these games as a kid, and they will always hold a special place in my heart. If you want a great story, gameplay, puzzles, and lessons. Play Twilight Princess, BotW, Wind Waker, etc. They're all fantastic.

name: The Caretaker
note: One of my favourite artists. Hauntingly beautiful. Liminality as a concept is something I take a lot of inspiration in, especially when creating atmosphere in games, or renders, or what have you.

name: La La Land
note: The cost of ambition, and romantic melancholy. When we did this movie in class, my classmates criticized the ending, but I think it teaches the hard lesson that not everything works out. Be happy it happened. 10/10.

name: Fight Club
note: Nihilism, consumerism, and an endless search for meaning. While it may have been criticized upon release, for any young man I believe it's a must watch. 10/10.

name: DDLC
note: A psychological horror masterpiece disguised as a dating sim. Written by a single person, this game defies its own genre in ways you can only understand by playing it. 10/10.
